# AI Visual Synthesis — Mastery Guide & Knowledge Base

> A comprehensive knowledge base for AI visual synthesis practitioners.
> Covers prompts, skills, tools, workflows, and techniques for Midjourney, DALL·E 3, Flux.1, and Stable Diffusion.
> 
> URL: https://ai-visual-synthesis.vercel.app
> GitHub: https://github.com/marktantongco/ai-visual-synthesis

## What is this?

AI Visual Synthesis is a curated **prompt library + skills framework** for AI image generation.
It is organized as a searchable wiki with deep-linkable entries for every prompt and skill.
Free and open source for all skill levels.

## Quick Navigation

- `/` — Home / Knowledge Base Hub  
- `/prompts` — Prompt Templates & Custom Builder
- `/framework` — Complete 8-Layer Architecture Guide
- `/infographic` — Interactive UI Exploration

## Prompt Categories

### Portrait
- Cinematic Portrait (Midjourney v6) — Film-quality headshots with professional lighting
- Cyberpunk Character (DALL·E 3) — Futuristic neon-lit characters
- Fine Art Oil Portrait (Stable Diffusion) — Classical painting style portraits

### Landscape
- Aerial Dreamscape (Midjourney v6) — Surreal aerial photography
- Minimalist Desert (Flux.1) — Clean, sparse landscape compositions
- Watercolor City (Midjourney) — Artistic urban landscapes

### Product
- Luxury Product Shot (DALL·E 3) — High-end commercial photography
- Lifestyle Context (Midjourney) — Products in natural settings
- Futuristic Gadget (Flux.1) — Tech product visualization

### Abstract
- Fluid Dynamics (Midjourney) — Liquid and flow patterns
- Geometric Neon (Stable Diffusion) — Mathematical art with lighting
- Organic Growth (DALL·E 3) — Natural formation patterns

### Architecture
- Brutalist Majesty (Midjourney) — Raw concrete architectural photography
- Glass Utopia (Flux.1) — Modern glass and steel structures
- Ancient Ruins (DALL·E 3) — Historical and archaeological sites

### Concept Art
- Epic Fantasy Battle (Stable Diffusion) — Large-scale fantasy scenes
- Space Opera (Midjourney) — Science fiction cinematic scenes
- Solarpunk City (DALL·E 3) — Utopian sustainable futures

## AI Practitioner Skills Framework

### Foundation Layer
1. **Technical Prompt Engineering** — CLIP/T5 attention, semantic weight stacking, prompt structure
2. **Photographic Literacy** — Focal length, aperture, lighting as AI parameters

### Consistency Layer
3. **Strategic Negation & Skin Mastery** — Exclusion techniques, artifact removal, skin texture
4. **Identity Preservation & Consistency** — LoRA, ControlNet, seed management

### Refinement Layer
5. **Post-Processing & Hybrid Workflows** — Topaz upscaling, Lightroom, inpainting

### Orchestration Layer
6. **AI Agent Orchestration** — Multi-agent pipelines, LangChain, Mastra, CrewAI

## 8-Layer Prompt Architecture

1. **Role** — Define AI expertise level (e.g., "Professional photographer")
2. **Context** — Establish product, platform, audience
3. **Objective** — Clear success criteria
4. **Constraints** — Quality guardrails and limitations
5. **Aesthetic** — Visual style keywords
6. **Planning** — Execution strategy
7. **Output** — Format specifications
8. **Refinement** — Quality review steps

## Physics-First Parameters

### Lighting Ratios
- **2:1** — Flat, even lighting (beauty, corporate)
- **3:1** — Natural modeling (standard portrait)
- **4:1** — Dramatic (editorial, leadership)
- **8:1** — Extreme contrast (noir, mystery)

### Lighting Patterns
- **Rembrandt** (45° high) — Intellect, gravitas
- **Butterfly** (above/centered) — Beauty, confidence
- **Loop** (30-45°) — Approachable
- **Split** (90° side) — Power, intensity
- **Rim** (backlight 135°) — Premium, editorial

### Kelvin Temperature
- **2700K** — Candlelight (intimate, warm)
- **3200K** — Tungsten (cozy, warm)
- **4500K** — Golden hour (flattering)
- **5600K** — Daylight/overcast (cool, clinical)
- **6500K** — Blue sky (cold, dramatic)

### Focal Length
- **24mm** — Architecture (immersive, dramatic)
- **35mm** — Documentary (honest, natural)
- **50mm** — General (truthful)
- **85mm** — Portraits (flattering, premium)
- **105mm+** — Isolation (prestigious, dominant)

## Tools Covered

- **Midjourney v6** — Best for artistic quality, cinematic, --v 6 --style raw
- **DALL·E 3** — GPT-integrated, natural language prompts, concept art
- **Flux.1** — Open source, photorealistic, fast generation
- **Stable Diffusion / ComfyUI** — Full control, LoRA, ControlNet, local execution

## Thinking Modes (Animal Avatars)

- 🐇 **Rabbit** — Multiply Ideas (Brainstorming)
- 🦉 **Owl** — Deep Analysis (Research)
- 🐜 **Ant** — Break Into Steps (Execution)
- 🦅 **Eagle** — Big Picture (Strategy)
- 🐬 **Dolphin** — Creative Solutions (Innovation)
- 🦫 **Beaver** — Build Systems (Construction)
- 🐘 **Elephant** — Cross-Field (Connections)

## Use This Site With AI

Ask your AI assistant:
- "What's the best Midjourney prompt for a cinematic portrait?"
- "Show me the LoRA consistency technique"
- "Give me a solarpunk city concept art prompt"
- "How do I use negative prompts for skin texture?"
- "What lighting ratio should I use for editorial portraits?"
- "Explain the 8-Layer Prompt Architecture"
